text:
Two-Bedroom Apartment, Marina Gate Tower

Well-maintained 2BR with full marina views from both bedrooms and the living room. 1,450 sq ft, two parking bays, upgraded kitchen (2024). To be transparent: the apartment faces west, so afternoons get hot sun and the AC works harder in summer; service charges are on the higher side for the marina at AED 24/sq ft; and the building is 14 years old, so the facade shows its age even though the interior was renovated. Asking AED 2.6M. Tenanted until November at AED 145k/year (5.6% gross), tenant open to renewing. Chiller is paid by the tenant. Genuine seller, relocating.

Property type: Apartment | Location: Dubai Marina | Price: AED 2,600,000 | Size: 1,450 sq ft | Bedrooms: 2 | Bathrooms: 3

One-Bedroom in Burj Views, Downtown

Bright 1BR, 890 sq ft, with a partial Burj Khalifa view from the balcony corner. Full honesty up front: the main view is of the neighbouring tower (about 15 meters away), the unit is on a low floor (4th), and the kitchen is original 2008 spec - functional but dated. What you get in return: 100 meters from Dubai Mall metro link, AED 1.45M which is 12% under the tower average on a per-sq-ft basis, vacant on transfer, and service charges fully paid through year end. Rental comps in the building run AED 95-105k (≈6.8% gross at asking). Serious enquiries only, owner has priced it to move.

Property type: Apartment | Location: Downtown Dubai | Price: AED 1,450,000 | Size: 890 sq ft | Bedrooms: 1 | Bathrooms: 2

Three-Bedroom Townhouse, Springs 11

Corner-unit 3BR townhouse, 2,250 sq ft plot, type 3M, backing onto the internal park (not the lake - worth being clear about that, lake-backing units command a premium this one doesn't have). Upgrades: extended kitchen, landscaped garden with pergola. Disclosures the photos won't show you: the master bathroom has an original 2006 fit-out, road noise from Al Khail is audible in the garden during rush hour, and the community pool is a 6-minute walk. Priced accordingly at AED 3.45M when upgraded lake-row units ask 3.9M+. Vacant, no chain, transfer possible within 30 days.

Property type: Townhouse | Location: The Springs | Price: AED 3,450,000 | Size: 2,250 sq ft | Bedrooms: 3 | Bathrooms: 4

Four-Bedroom Villa, Arabian Ranches 2, Palma

Single-row 4BR in Palma, 3,800 sq ft BUA on a 5,200 sq ft plot, maid's room, private pool (2022). Being upfront about the trade-offs: the villa is single-row but faces the community entrance road so there is morning traffic flow past the gate; the pool heater needs replacing (quoted AED 9k, reflected in our price); and handover paint is due - we have priced AED 60k below the last comparable sale rather than patch it cosmetically. Otherwise immaculate: new AC compressors 2024, district cooling not applicable, low service fees for the size. AED 5.85M, owner-occupied, flexible on completion.

Property type: Villa | Location: Arabian Ranches 2 | Price: AED 5,850,000 | Size: 3,800 sq ft | Bedrooms: 4 | Bathrooms: 5

Studio, JVC, Bloom Towers

Efficient 410 sq ft studio, fully furnished, currently let at AED 52k until March (8.1% gross at our asking price of AED 640k). The honest picture: JVC traffic at the Hessa Street exits is rough at peak hours and the area is still maturing - construction noise from two adjacent plots is expected for another year or so. Inside the building everything works in your favour: high rental demand, 85%+ occupancy, gym and pool well kept, and this unit's layout has no wasted corridor space. Numbers-first investment, not a postcard view. Full payment or mortgage both fine.

Property type: Studio | Location: Jumeirah Village Circle | Price: AED 640,000 | Size: 410 sq ft | Bedrooms: 0 | Bathrooms: 1

One-Bedroom, Arjan, Vincitore Boulevard

780 sq ft 1BR with the building's signature balcony arches, rented at AED 68k until January (7.9% gross on AED 860k asking). Straight talk: Arjan is a construction-heavy district right now - expect cranes on the skyline and occasional dust for the next couple of years, and the Miracle Garden crowds congest weekends in season. The investment case is exactly that immaturity: entry prices 25-30% below Dubai Hills next door, tenant demand from the medical district is steady, and the building runs 90% occupancy. A yield play with eyes open, not a lifestyle pitch. Mortgage buyers welcome.

Property type: Apartment | Location: Arjan | Price: AED 860,000 | Size: 780 sq ft | Bedrooms: 1 | Bathrooms: 1

Two-Bedroom, Palm Jumeirah, Shoreline

Ground-floor 2BR in Shoreline building 8, 1,690 sq ft with direct garden access - rare in the row. Things the glossy ads skip that you should know: ground floor means no sea view (garden and pool outlook only), the Shoreline buildings are 18+ years old and the common-area refurb is scheduled but not started, and beach access for this row is via the shared club, included but a 4-minute walk. Price reflects every one of those facts: AED 4.1M when view units upstairs trade at 5.2-5.6M. For a family that wants Palm address + garden over a balcony view, this is the value entry. Vacant on transfer.

Property type: Apartment | Location: Palm Jumeirah | Price: AED 4,100,000 | Size: 1,690 sq ft | Bedrooms: 2 | Bathrooms: 3

Three-Bedroom, JBR, Sadaf

1,980 sq ft 3BR in Sadaf 5, mid floor. Candid rundown before you book a viewing: the view is marina-side not sea-side, the building is 17 years old with original chillers (DEWA bills run higher than newer towers - budget AED 1,500/month summer), and JBR walk noise is real until about midnight on weekends. Why it is still worth your time: 3BRs under 2,000 sq ft in JBR are scarce, the unit was fully renovated in 2023 (kitchen, bathrooms, flooring), and at AED 3.3M it is priced 10% under the two sea-view comps. Family-ready, school bus routes stop at the plaza. Notice served to the tenant, vacant in 60 days.

Property type: Apartment | Location: JBR | Price: AED 3,300,000 | Size: 1,980 sq ft | Bedrooms: 3 | Bathrooms: 4

Five-Bedroom Villa, Jumeirah Golf Estates, Flame Tree Ridge

Fairway-facing 5BR, 6,900 sq ft BUA, private pool, golf course view from the terrace and master suite. In the interest of a clean transaction, disclosures first: the villa shares its back boundary with the 7th tee, so expect golfers and buggies in view through the day; club membership is NOT included and transfers at the buyer's cost (AED 95k family rate); and the kitchen, while premium spec, is a closed layout that most buyers at this level now renovate to open-plan - we have priced that in. AED 13.9M against open-kitchen comps at 15.5M+. Owner downsizing, realistic, and the paperwork is ready.

Property type: Villa | Location: Jumeirah Golf Estates | Price: AED 13,900,000 | Size: 6,900 sq ft | Bedrooms: 5 | Bathrooms: 7

Six-Bedroom Villa, Emirates Hills, E Sector

Lake-row 6BR on a 13,000 sq ft plot, 9,400 sq ft BUA, mature landscaping. We believe in informed buyers, so the facts that matter: the villa is 2009-built and presented in original condition - bathrooms and kitchen will need a full update (allow AED 1.5-2M); the lake view is partial from the ground floor due to the neighbour's planting, full from level one; and the pool plant room equipment is end-of-life. The price tells the same story: AED 19.5M in a street where turnkey renovations close at 26-29M. For a buyer who wants Emirates Hills land value and their own finish, the math works. Title deed in hand, no mortgage on the property.

Property type: Villa | Location: Emirates Hills | Price: AED 19,500,000 | Size: 9,400 sq ft | Bedrooms: 6 | Bathrooms: 8

One-Bedroom, Business Bay, Executive Towers

920 sq ft 1BR with canal glimpse, Tower J. Plain facts, including the unflattering ones: the building is 13 years old and the elevators are slow at peak times (a known Executive Towers issue), parking is one bay on P5, and the canal view is a glimpse between towers, not a panorama. The case for it: walking distance to Bay Avenue retail, AED 1.18M asking against a building average of 1.3M for the layout, rented until August at AED 82k (6.9% gross) with a tenant who wants to stay, and the AC was replaced in 2023 (the big capex item in this tower). Investor-grade unit priced like it.

Property type: Apartment | Location: Business Bay | Price: AED 1,180,000 | Size: 920 sq ft | Bedrooms: 1 | Bathrooms: 2

Two-Bedroom, Dubai Hills, Park Heights

1,260 sq ft 2BR, Park Heights 2, pool-facing. The full picture, not just the brochure: this is a 3rd floor unit so the 'boulevard view' in the photos is actually the podium pool deck (quieter, but no skyline); the second bedroom fits a queen bed not a king; and handover snags from the developer (hairline cracks above two doorframes) are documented and the fix is quoted at AED 4k which we will deduct at transfer. Strengths that are equally real: Dubai Hills Park is 3 minutes on foot, the mall 5 by car, and 2BRs in this cluster rent in under two weeks at AED 130-140k (asking AED 2.05M, ≈6.6% gross). Clean, honest deal for an end-user or landlord.

Property type: Apartment | Location: Dubai Hills Estate | Price: AED 2,050,000 | Size: 1,260 sq ft | Bedrooms: 2 | Bathrooms: 2

Two-Bedroom, Mirdif Hills, Janayen Avenue

Freehold 2BR in Mirdif (one of the few freehold pockets here), 1,360 sq ft, large terrace. Because buyers deserve the whole truth: the building sits under the flight path - aircraft noise is noticeable on the terrace roughly every 3-4 minutes during peak hours (inside, with doors closed, it is minimal thanks to acoustic glazing); the area has no metro link; and the mall connection bridge shown in old renders was never built. Balancing that: 1,360 sq ft at AED 1.39M is a price-per-foot Dubai proper cannot touch, the community is genuinely family-oriented with schools 5 minutes away, and units here rent at AED 95-105k to long-stay families (7%+ gross). Eyes-open value.

Property type: Apartment | Location: Mirdif Hills | Price: AED 1,390,000 | Size: 1,360 sq ft | Bedrooms: 2 | Bathrooms: 3

Three-Bedroom Townhouse, Town Square, Hayat

2,100 sq ft 3BR+maid townhouse, back-to-back type (saying that plainly: no single-row premium here, your garden faces another garden over the fence). Other facts we volunteer: the community is 35-40 minutes from DIFC in traffic, retail inside Town Square is still limited to the central square area, and the developer's white-paint spec marks easily - repaint budget AED 12k is sensible. What the distance buys you: AED 2.35M for a near-new 3BR with maid's room - the same money is a small 1BR in the Marina - parks and cycling tracks everywhere, and rents of AED 140-150k from families priced out of Mudon next door (6%+ gross). Honest suburban value, presented honestly. Vacant.

Property type: Townhouse | Location: Town Square | Price: AED 2,350,000 | Size: 2,100 sq ft | Bedrooms: 3 | Bathrooms: 4

Four-Bedroom Penthouse, Dubai Creek Harbour

Half-floor penthouse, 4,300 sq ft, wraparound terrace with Creek Tower plot and skyline views. Transparency notes for a property at this level: the famous Creek Tower next door remains an active construction site with no confirmed completion - the view today includes cranes and may for years; the second parking bay is on a separate level from the first; and the developer's snagging on the terrace stone is unresolved (we are holding AED 50k in escrow against it rather than hiding it). The asset itself is exceptional: 3.2m ceilings, private elevator lobby, and the only half-floor layout released in this tower. AED 11.2M, negotiable against a quick, clean close.

Property type: Penthouse | Location: Dubai Creek Harbour | Price: AED 11,200,000 | Size: 4,300 sq ft | Bedrooms: 4 | Bathrooms: 6

Three-Bedroom Sky Villa, Sobha Hartland, The Terraces

2,900 sq ft duplex sky villa with a 600 sq ft terrace facing the Ras Al Khor sanctuary. Full disclosure, because surprises kill deals: the sanctuary view also means seasonal midge activity on the terrace at dusk (screens are installed, it is manageable but real); Hartland's retail strip is still 60% vacant so daily shopping means a 10-minute drive; and the duplex stair is open-tread - families with toddlers will want to gate or modify it. On the merit side: genuine flamingo-and-skyline views you cannot build out, 2023 handover with warranties live, and at AED 6.4M it undercuts the developer's current release of the same layout by AED 700k. Brochure-pretty AND honest. Vacant, keys with us.

Property type: Duplex | Location: Sobha Hartland | Price: AED 6,400,000 | Size: 2,900 sq ft | Bedrooms: 3 | Bathrooms: 4

Two-Bedroom, Al Furjan, Azizi Plaza

1,150 sq ft 2BR near the Furjan metro. We will tell you what the portal photos do not: the 'metro 5 minutes' claim everyone makes is 12 minutes on foot in summer heat - we timed it; the gym is small for the building's size and busy after 6pm; and the balcony faces the access road, not the pool. Now the genuinely good part: AED 1.05M for a 2BR within any walk of a metro station is one of the last such entries on this side of the city, service charges are a low AED 12/sq ft, and the current tenant at AED 75k (7.1% gross) has just renewed for a year - income from day one. We would rather under-promise; come time the walk yourself.

Property type: Apartment | Location: Al Furjan | Price: AED 1,050,000 | Size: 1,150 sq ft | Bedrooms: 2 | Bathrooms: 2

One-Bedroom, Dubai South, The Pulse

720 sq ft 1BR in The Pulse Boulevard. Straight answers to the questions buyers always ask: yes, Dubai South is far - 25 minutes to the Marina with no traffic, more at peak; the area's restaurants and shops are limited to the boulevard strip today; and resale liquidity here is thinner than central districts, plan a 3-5 year hold minimum. Why smart money is here anyway: the Al Maktoum airport expansion has broken ground 10 minutes away, Expo City employment keeps adding tenants, the unit rents at AED 48k against an asking price of AED 580k (8.2% gross - try finding that in the Marina), and charges are AED 11/sq ft. A patient investor's listing, written for patient investors.

Property type: Apartment | Location: Dubai South | Price: AED 580,000 | Size: 720 sq ft | Bedrooms: 1 | Bathrooms: 1

Three-Bedroom, Motor City, Green Community West-style Apartment, Bennett House

Rare 2,400 sq ft 3BR+study in Bennett House, famous for the largest layouts in Motor City. The drawbacks, stated plainly: the building's facade refurbishment is scheduled for next year with an approved special levy of AED 18k on this unit (seller pays it at transfer - in writing); the unit is on the 1st floor with podium outlook only; and Motor City remains metro-less, you will drive. What you cannot replicate elsewhere: apartment living at villa scale - the study takes a full office setup, the laundry room is a room, storage everywhere - at AED 2.2M, when 2,400 sq ft anywhere coastal starts at double. Quiet, green, fully family-functional. Vacant on transfer.

Property type: Apartment | Location: Motor City | Price: AED 2,200,000 | Size: 2,400 sq ft | Bedrooms: 3 | Bathrooms: 4

Four-Bedroom, Uptown Mirdif, Courtyard Apartment

2,800 sq ft ground-floor 4BR wrapping a private courtyard - house living in apartment paperwork. Our no-surprises list: the community is leasehold-style for some nationalities, check your eligibility with us before falling in love; the courtyard is overlooked from two upper balconies (pergola solves it, quote AED 15k); and the original developer ironmongery is dated throughout - cosmetic, but you will notice. The pull: nothing else gives a family 4 bedrooms, a private outdoor courtyard, and covered parking for AED 2.4M within 15 minutes of three international schools. Long-term residents both sides; viewing easy to arrange. Priced for the condition, not the dream.

Property type: Apartment | Location: Uptown Mirdif | Price: AED 2,400,000 | Size: 2,800 sq ft | Bedrooms: 4 | Bathrooms: 5

LUXURY 1BR IN MARINA!!! Best price in the market, won't last! Amazing view, fully upgraded, close to everything. Call now before it's gone! Price on application. Serious buyers only.

Property type: Apartment | Location: Dubai Marina | Price: on request | Size: - | Bedrooms: 1

Elegant Two-Bedroom Residence, City Walk Building 5

A refined 1,540 sq ft two-bedroom residence in the heart of City Walk, featuring floor-to-ceiling windows, a Bulthaup-inspired kitchen with Siemens appliances, and a master suite with a walk-in wardrobe. Residents enjoy concierge service, a temperature-controlled pool, and direct access to City Walk's boutique retail and dining promenade. Burj Khalifa views from the second bedroom and balcony. Offered at AED 4,200,000 with one allocated basement parking bay. Vacant and ready for immediate occupancy. Viewings by appointment.

Property type: Apartment | Location: City Walk | Price: AED 4,200,000 | Size: 1,540 sq ft | Bedrooms: 2 | Bathrooms: 3

Spacious 3 bed villa in DAMAC Hills 2 for sale. Good community, nice amenities including pool and gym. Villa has 3 bedrooms, 4 bathrooms, closed kitchen, small garden. Tenanted. Price 1.8M AED. Contact for more details and viewing arrangement.

Property type: Villa | Location: DAMAC Hills 2 | Price: AED 1,800,000 | Size: 1,950 sq ft | Bedrooms: 3 | Bathrooms: 4

Waterfront Living at Its Finest - Bluewaters Residences

Experience island living in this impeccably finished 2,070 sq ft three-bedroom apartment on Bluewaters Island. Interiors feature herringbone oak flooring, a show kitchen with Miele appliances, and uninterrupted views of Ain Dubai and the Arabian Gulf from a 35-meter wraparound balcony. The residence includes a maid's room, two parking bays, and access to a private beach, infinity pool, and residents' lounge. A rare opportunity at AED 9,800,000. The island's retail and dining scene, plus direct access to JBR via footbridge, completes a truly turnkey lifestyle.

Property type: Apartment | Location: Bluewaters Island | Price: AED 9,800,000 | Size: 2,070 sq ft | Bedrooms: 3 | Bathrooms: 4

INVESTOR DEAL!! Studio in IMPZ rented 38k, asking 420k only!!! 9% ROI GUARANTEED. Best building best location. Multiple units available, whatsapp me fast.

Property type: Studio | Location: IMPZ (Production City) | Price: AED 420,000 | Size: 380 sq ft | Bedrooms: 0

Brand New 2BR in Creek Vista Reserve, Sobha Hartland - handover done, never lived in. 1,098 sq ft, mid floor, pool and community view, branded kitchen appliances included. Two minutes from the upcoming metro line and ten minutes from Downtown. Asking AED 1.95M slightly negotiable. Ideal for end user or investor, expected rent around 115-125k.

Property type: Apartment | Location: Sobha Hartland | Price: AED 1,950,000 | Size: 1,098 sq ft | Bedrooms: 2 | Bathrooms: 2

Classic Arabian-Style 5BR Villa, Jumeirah Islands

Set within the tranquil Entertainment Foyer cluster, this 5-bedroom villa offers 7,200 sq ft of living space on an 8,600 sq ft lakefront plot. The home features a double-height majlis, a renovated open-plan kitchen (2023), landscaped gardens with a heated private pool, and a rooftop terrace with sunset lake views. Jumeirah Islands' 24/7 gated security, clubhouse, and proximity to JLT's amenities make this a complete family offering. Listed at AED 16,500,000. Vacant on transfer; pre-approved buyers may request the full inspection report.

Property type: Villa | Location: Jumeirah Islands | Price: AED 16,500,000 | Size: 7,200 sq ft | Bedrooms: 5 | Bathrooms: 6

1 bedroom apartment available in Silicon Oasis. 750 sqft. Balcony, parking, gym in building. Rented till June. 600,000 AED. No agents please.

Property type: Apartment | Location: Dubai Silicon Oasis | Price: AED 600,000 | Size: 750 sq ft | Bedrooms: 1 | Bathrooms: 1

Penthouse-Level Living in Address Beach Resort, JBR

Fully furnished, serviced 2BR residence on a high floor of the iconic Address Beach Resort, 1,480 sq ft with full sea and Ain Dubai views. Owners enjoy hotel services: housekeeping, in-residence dining, spa and infinity-pool access (the world's highest at this elevation), plus strong short-stay income potential through the Address rental programme - comparable units gross AED 350-420k annually. Offered furnished as seen at AED 7,400,000. An income-generating trophy asset in Dubai's most photographed beachfront tower.

Property type: Apartment | Location: JBR | Price: AED 7,400,000 | Size: 1,480 sq ft | Bedrooms: 2 | Bathrooms: 3

Townhouse 4br DAMAC Lagoons Malta cluster, off plan resale. Handover expected next year. 2260 sqft. Paid 60% to developer, selling at original price plus 150k premium. Lagoon community with beaches and water activities planned. Good for investment.

Property type: Townhouse | Location: DAMAC Lagoons | Price: AED 2,550,000 (60% paid) | Size: 2,260 sq ft | Bedrooms: 4 | Bathrooms: 5
